html:
Exclusive to:  

The Siesta Lean-to is a craftable Structure. It requires 2 Silk, 4 Boards, and 3 Rope to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.

Siesta Lean-to has been altered to a similar fashion as the Tent, healing over time, instead of instantly. While sleeping in the lean-to, players regenerate 1/sec & 2/sec at the cost of a mere 0.33/sec. It also reduces Wetness by 1/second, and lowers Body Temperature by 1/second as long as the player's temperature is greater than 40. All outside temperature sources are ignored, so the player's temperature will not decrease if it is below 40.

Wickerbottom can not use the Siesta Lean-to due to her insomnia.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Elegant
Cawnival Collection
Cawnival Siesta Spot
Between all those Cawnival games, a quick siesta might be just the ticket.
Woven - Elegant
Mystic Collection
Luxurious Lean-to
A wispy haven for your daydreams.
Woven - Elegant
Swamp Collection
Swampy Siesta Shade
Bogged down? You'll sleep like a log in here.

Tips

  • One could have the Siesta Lean-to prebuilt in case of emergency overheating. It may then be placed to cool down, while also giving some sanity and health. This way of using the Lean-to should only be used if one does not have an Endothermic Fire Pit ready, as the structure has a limited amount of uses and costs time.

Trivia

  • A siesta is a short nap taken during midday in some countries with hotter climates.
  • A Lean-to is a type of shelter that consists of rafters leaning against a wall or structure forming a roof. Lean-tos are associated with camping and wilderness survival.

"siestahut"
“A nice place for an afternoon rest out of the heat.”
–Wilson
“They taught us how to make these in Girl Scouts.”
–Willow
“Napping place.”
–Wolfgang
“A siesta is but a preview of death.”
–Wendy
“I CAN HIBERNATE MY SESSION IN THERE”
–WX-78
“I can barely sleep on a bed, nevermind the ground.”
–Wickerbottom
“Naps are important during a long day of chopping.”
–Woodie
“Rustic, but excellent shade.”
–Maxwell
“A place tö rest my battle-weary head.”
–Wigfrid
“Is it nap time?”
–Webber
“Comes in handy after a big lunch.”
–Warly
“Nap time?”
–Wormwood
“What sort of bonehead sleeps during the day?!”
–Winona
“I could catch a wink, I think.”
–Wortox
“Wanna take a nap! Nap right here...”
–Wurt
“A shady spot for a quick nap.”
–Walter
“I could stand to spend a moment or two out of the heat.”
–Wanda
The Siesta Lean-to is a craftable Structure. It requires 2 Silk, 4 Boards, and 3 Rope to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.
Siesta Lean-to has been altered to a similar fashion as the Tent, healing over time, instead of instantly. While sleeping in the lean-to, players regenerate 1/sec & 2/sec at the cost of a mere 0.33/sec. It also reduces Wetness by 1/second, and lowers Body Temperature by 1/second as long as the player's temperature is greater than 40. All outside temperature sources are ignored, so the player's temperature will not decrease if it is below 40.

Nap right here... |walter = A shady spot for a quick nap. |wanda = I could stand to spend a moment or two out of the heat. |choose = webber}} The '''Siesta Lean-to''' is a craftable [[Structure]]. It requires 2 [[Silk]], 4 [[Boards]], and 3 [[Rope]] to craft and an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype. Siesta Lean-to has been altered to a similar fashion as the [[Tent]], healing over time, instead of instantly. While sleeping in the lean-to, players regenerate 1{{Sanity}}/sec & 2{{Hp}}/sec at the cost of a mere 0.33{{hunger}}/sec. It also reduces [[Wetness]] by 1/second, and lowers [[Overheating|Body Temperature]] by 1/second as long as the player's temperature is greater than 40. All outside temperature sources are ignored, so the player's temperature will not decrease if it is below 40. [[Wickerbottom]] can not use the Siesta Lean-to due to her insomnia. __NOTOC__ == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Structure Skins|Belongings}}
